italics.underline: OFFER OF APPOINTMENT AS A VISITING SENIOR LECTURER

text.p: I write on behalf of the Governing Council of Osun State University, Osogbo to offer you visiting appointment as a Senior Lecturer in the Department of Economics & Management Sciences, College of Management & Social Sciences of this University. This appointment shall be under the following terms:
2. The duties of your post shall be such as your Head of Department may direct from time to time.
3. The appointment would automatically lapse if nothing is heard from you within two (2) months from the date of the offer. Your salary will be placed on CONUASS 5 (N2,015,716.80k - N2,905,070.40k);

5. The appointment will terminate by either party hereto giving the other a three-month notice in writing of intention to do so (or by tendering payment of three months' salary in lieu of notice) unless the consent of the Council has otherwise been obtained. The notice of your intention to terminate the appointment should coincide with the end of session;
6. The Council may determine your appointment in the event of any misconduct or persistent unpunctuality, neglect of duty or breach of any rules or regulations made by the Council.

8. Also enclosed is a copy each of Medical Examination Form and Personal Data Form, which should be completed and returned to the Registrar within three (3) weeks, together with your acceptance letter.
